Symptom Inquiry: I can share general information about common respiratory symptoms, but I cannot confirm what condition you have.
Self-Care Advice: I can give general self-care guidance for mild symptoms using the supported course-project knowledge base.
Medication Question: I can provide general medication safety information only. I cannot tell you what you personally should take.
Seek Medical Help: I can share general warning signs that suggest contacting a clinician or urgent care, without diagnosing the cause.
